metadata.name: K3s Post-Install Platform Setup
metadata.description: Configures common post-install building blocks for a fresh K3s cluster. Supports kubeconfig retrieval, namespace management, Traefik dashboard exposure, cert-manager bootstrap, metrics-server, Longhorn preparation, and optional kube-system tuning.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
This playbook handles practical post-install steps for a K3s cluster after the control plane is reachable.

## Prerequisites
- Confirm the control machine can reach the cluster API and that the selected kubeconfig path is writable if you enable kubeconfig fetch.
- Install the `kubernetes.core` Ansible collection and ensure the control machine has Python Kubernetes dependencies available.
- Install Helm on the control machine if you enable any Helm-managed add-ons.
- Review the Longhorn prerequisites and package assumptions before enabling host preparation on production nodes.

## Run
1. Render `main.yml` and confirm the kubeconfig source, namespace list, and which add-ons you actually want enabled.
2. Run the playbook against the inventory that contains the K3s server and any nodes you want to prepare for Longhorn.
3. Verify the generated cluster resources, Helm releases, and any kube-system changes after the play completes.

## Notes
- The kube-proxy strictARP option is useful for MetalLB in layer2 mode and is kept as an explicit toggle.
- Cert-manager resources are optional and use realistic placeholders so you can wire in your own DNS provider credentials later.

## Docs
- [K3s Documentation](https://docs.k3s.io/)
- [Traefik Documentation](https://doc.traefik.io/traefik/)
- [cert-manager](https://cert-manager.io/)
- [Metrics Server](https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/metrics-server)
- [Longhorn Documentation](https://longhorn.io/docs/)

items.name: secrets_file
items.title: Secrets File
items.description: Optional vars file to load before running the playbook.

items.name: fetch_kubeconfig
items.title: Fetch Kubeconfig
items.description: Fetch the admin kubeconfig from the first K3s server before applying cluster resources

items.name: kubeconfig_source_host
items.title: Source Host
items.description: Inventory host that stores the K3s admin kubeconfig

items.name: kubeconfig_source_path
items.title: Source Path
items.description: Path to the kubeconfig file on the K3s server

items.name: kubeconfig_server_endpoint
items.title: API Endpoint
items.description: Host or IP that should replace 127.0.0.1 in the fetched kubeconfig

items.name: kubeconfig_local_path
items.title: Local Kubeconfig
items.description: Local kubeconfig path used by the control machine for all cluster operations

items.name: ensure_namespaces
items.title: Manage Namespaces
items.description: Ensure common namespaces exist before installing platform add-ons

items.name: extra_namespaces_yaml
items.title: Extra Namespaces
items.description: YAML list of extra namespaces to create

items.name: traefik_dashboard_exposure_enabled
items.title: Expose Dashboard
items.description: Create a Traefik IngressRoute that exposes the internal Traefik dashboard

items.name: traefik_dashboard_namespace
items.title: Namespace
items.description: Namespace where the Traefik release is installed

items.name: traefik_dashboard_host
items.title: Dashboard Host
items.description: FQDN used to expose the Traefik dashboard

items.title: Entrypoint
items.description: Traefik entrypoint for the dashboard route

items.description: Enable TLS for the dashboard route

items.title: TLS Secret
items.description: TLS secret used by the dashboard route when TLS is enabled

items.name: traefik_dashboard_middleware_name
items.title: Middleware
items.description: Optional Traefik middleware name attached to the dashboard route

items.name: traefik_dashboard_middleware_namespace
items.title: Middleware NS
items.description: Namespace for the optional dashboard middleware

items.title: Cloudflare Token

items.description: Name of the cert-manager ClusterIssuer

items.name: cert_manager_acme_email
items.title: ACME Email

items.name: cert_manager_acme_server
items.title: ACME Server
